name: enterprise-react-microfrontend-portal
description: Enterprise React Microfrontend Portal demonstrating Module Federation architecture

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=shared-ui" "npm run dev --workspace=profile-mf" "npm run dev --workspace=notifications-mf" "npm run dev --workspace=reports-mf" "npm run dev --workspace=host-app"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared-ui && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
